title: Coordinated Private Infrastructure Cutoff of Lawful Opposition Organization
description: Payment processors and hosting firms jointly cut off a lawful opposition organization during a federal election period. No formal government coercion is proved. The scenario tests the new narrow continuity remedy for coordinated exclusion by dominant civic intermediaries.

events.actor: Dominant payment processors and hosting firms

details.firms: dominant payment processors and hosting firms
details.organization: a lawful opposition organization operating nationally
